heading: Principles for International Monetary Fund lending
label: 286oo Principles for International Monetary Fund lending
notes: CodificationSection 101(a) [title VIII, § 805] of , which directed amendment of the Bretton Woods Agreement Act by adding this section, was executed by amending the Bretton Woods Agreements Act by adding this section, to reflect the probable intent of Congress.Pub. L. 106–429
amendments: CodificationSection 101(a) [title VIII, § 805] of , which directed amendment of the Bretton Woods Agreement Act by adding this section, was executed by amending the Bretton Woods Agreements Act by adding this section, to reflect the probable intent of Congress.Pub. L. 106–429

children.heading: Short-term balance of payments financing
children.label: 1 Short-term balance of payments financing
children.text: Lending from the general resources of the Fund should concentrate chiefly on short-term balance of payments financing.

children.label: A
children.text: when a member’s balance of payments problems will be protracted;

children.label: B
children.text: such member has a strong structural reform program in place; and

children.label: C
children.text: the member has little or no access to private sources of capital.

children.heading: Premium pricing
children.label: 3 Premium pricing
children.text: Premium pricing should be introduced for lending from the general resources of the Fund, for greater than 200 percent of a member’s quota in the Fund, to discourage excessive use of Fund lending and to encourage members to rely on private financing to the maximum extent possible.

children.label: A
children.text: suspending Fund disbursements and ensuring that Fund lending is not resumed to members that engage in serious misreporting of material information until such time as remedial actions and sanctions, as appropriate, have been applied;

children.label: B
children.text: ensuring that members make early repayments, where appropriate, of Fund resources disbursed on the basis of misreported information;

children.label: C
children.text: making public cases of serious misreporting of material information;

children.label: D
children.text: requiring all members receiving new disbursements from the Fund to undertake annually independent audits of central bank financial statements and publish the resulting audits; and

children.label: E
children.text: requiring all members seeking new loans from the Fund to provide to the Fund detailed information regarding their internal control procedures, financial reporting and audit mechanisms and, in cases where there are questions about the adequacy of these systems, undertaking an on-site review and identifying needed remedies.
